name: docx-to-wangeditor-html
description: Convert Word (.docx) documents into clean semantic HTML that pastes correctly into a wangEditor v4 rich-text editor. Preserves headings/bold/tables and de-schemes URLs to avoid wangEditor's paste-flatten bug. 把 Word 文档转成可直接粘进 wangEditor 富文本编辑器的干净语义化 HTML，保留标题/加粗/表格，并去掉 URL 的 http(s):// 以规避会让整篇塌成纯文本的粘贴坑。
